pages.text: Late weapons are not unlocked by a short quest. They are tied to $(l)Branded Progress$(), which rises while you are Branded. The default requirement for the true weapon gate is $(l)99.5%$() of the full progress track.

pages.title: Branded Time Checker
pages.text: Craft a $(l)Branded Time Checker$() with a $(item)Book$() and a $(item)Gold Ring$(). This tool helps track total observed time, Branded time, and whether your burden is great enough to meet the late-game weapon gate.
The $(l)Branded Time Checker$() shows total observed time, branded time, progress ratio, and whether the burden is sufficient for the late-game weapons.
pages.title: Branded Time Checker

pages.text: $(l)Shared rule for Sloth, Pride, and Envy$()$(br)All three current sin weapons use the same Branded-time gate in the code path you shared. In creative mode, the config can optionally bypass that requirement for testing.

$(l)Practical advice$()$(br)If players ask why a weapon is locked, the short answer is almost always: $(br)$(li)You must be Branded$(li)You must have endured enough Branded Time$(li)The weapon will stay dormant until both are true
